reasoning: The Comments History reveals this is the 4th refund request from Barbara Allen related to subscription confusion, not product discrepancy. Previous notes confirm: 1) Customer has monthly subscription they misunderstand, 2) All prior refunds were legitimate due to auto-renewal confusion, 3) Customer previously apologized after support explanation, 4) Current request matches pattern ("I know it's my fault but can't afford this month"). The order details show correct product (Sample Product/SKU PRODUCT-001) was shipped. The security alert appears to be a false positive as staff explicitly noted "NOT FRAUD" and confirmed customer's historical legitimacy. Per protocol, approve refund and recommend subscription pause feature as documented in previous staff notes.
